case_title: GEOFFREY PATRICK SKAATES VS. MARTINE JOSEPHINE VELKENIERS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUL-01-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
